chooseResponse.q: What do you think about the new dining hall?

conversation.transcript:
Student: Have you checked out the new dining hall yet?
Advisor: Yes, I went there yesterday. It's really nice!
Student: I heard they have a salad bar and a smoothie station.
Advisor: Exactly! They also have a variety of vegetarian options.

questions.q: What did the student ask about?
questions.explain: 學生在詢問新餐廳的情況。

questions.q: What did the advisor think about the dining hall?
questions.explain: 顧問認為新餐廳非常好。

announcement.transcript: Attention students! The campus bookstore is having a sale this weekend. All textbooks are 20% off and there will be additional discounts on supplies. Don’t miss out on this chance to save money on your essential items!

questions.q: What type of items are on sale?
questions.explain: 書店正在促銷教科書和文具。
促銷活動是在本週末舉行。

talk.transcript: Today, we will discuss the concept of sustainable development. Sustainable development refers to meeting the needs of the present without compromising the ability of future generations to meet their own needs. It encompasses economic growth, environmental protection, and social equity. By balancing these three pillars, we can ensure a healthier planet for future inhabitants. For example, using renewable energy sources reduces our reliance on fossil fuels, which helps protect the environment while fostering economic growth. Overall, sustainable development is essential for achieving long-term prosperity and preserving our planet.

questions.q: What does sustainable development aim to achieve?
questions.explain: 可持續發展的目標是滿足未來世代的需求。

questions.q: Which pillar is NOT mentioned in the talk?
questions.explain: 演講中沒有提到技術進步這一支柱。

questions.q: What is one example of sustainable development mentioned?
questions.explain: 提到的可持續發展的一個例子是使用可再生能源。
可持續發展對於確保長期繁榮非常重要。
